# terrible_community_clickhouse_clickhouse_grants (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `grantee` (String) A user or a role to grant, update, or revoke privileges for.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against

### Optional

- `cluster` (String) Run the grant/revoke commands on all cluster hosts. If the cluster is not configured, the command will fail with an error.
- `exclusive` (Boolean) If set to `false` (the default), the module will append the privileges specified in `privileges` to the privileges the `grantee` already has. If set to `true`, the module will revoke all current privileges from the `grantee` before granting the new ones.
- `privileges` (String) Privileges to grant. This option is required when `state` is `present`. It's a list of dictionaries, where each dictionary specifies a set of privileges on a database object.
- `state` (String) If `present`, the module will grant or update privileges. If `absent`, the module will revoke all privileges from the `grantee`.

### Read-Only

- `diff` (String) Differences between the previous and current state. Only returned when diff mode is enabled (with `--diff` or in `check_mode`).
- `executed_statements` (String) Data-modifying executed statements.
